mapper.select: SELECT * FROM app_h5_user_profile_ext WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_h5_user_profile_ext ( user_id, nickname, avatar, bio, vip_type, vip_expires_at, score, gold_coin, daily_chat_quota, chat_quota_override, daily_chat_used, daily_byok_chat_used, daily_image_quota, image_quota_override, daily_image_used, usage_reset_date, character_create_allowed, need_edit, status, gender, birthday, height, weight, country, characters, relation, occupation, label, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{bio}, #{vipType}, #{vipExpiresAt}, #{score}, #{goldCoin}, #{dailyChatQuota}, #{chatQuotaOverride}, #{dailyChatUsed}, #{dailyByokChatUsed}, #{dailyImageQuota}, #{imageQuotaOverride}, #{dailyImageUsed}, #{usageResetDate}, COALESCE(#{characterCreateAllowed}, 0), #{needEdit}, #{status}, #{gender}, #{birthday}, #{height}, #{weight}, #{country}, #{characters}, #{relation}, #{occupation}, #{label}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE nickname = VALUES(nickname), avatar = VALUES(avatar), bio = VALUES(bio), vip_type = VALUES(vip_type), vip_expires_at = VALUES(vip_expires_at), score = VALUES(score), gold_coin = VALUES(gold_coin), daily_chat_quota = VALUES(daily_chat_quota), chat_quota_override = VALUES(chat_quota_override), daily_chat_used = VALUES(daily_chat_used), daily_byok_chat_used = VALUES(daily_byok_chat_used), daily_image_quota = VALUES(daily_image_quota), image_quota_override = VALUES(image_quota_override), daily_image_used = VALUES(daily_image_used), usage_reset_date = VALUES(usage_reset_date), character_create_allowed = VALUES(character_create_allowed), need_edit = VALUES(need_edit), status = VALUES(status), gender = VALUES(gender), birthday = VALUES(birthday), height = VALUES(height), weight = VALUES(weight), country = VALUES(country), characters = VALUES(characters), relation = VALUES(relation), occupation = VALUES(occupation), label = VALUES(label), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
